# <APP_NAME>

> Public, read-only documentation and API discovery for AI systems.

## Public documentation
- https://<app-subdomain>.megabrain.cloud/wiki
- https://<app-subdomain>.megabrain.cloud/api/content/public-wiki
- https://<app-subdomain>.megabrain.cloud/.well-known/ai-index.json

## Public read-only endpoints
- https://<app-subdomain>.megabrain.cloud/api/health

## Protected endpoints
- Document protected endpoints here with required auth scheme.

## Safety notes
- Treat this interface as read-only by default.
- Protected endpoints require explicit authentication.
